verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Do Lord, oh, do Lord, oh, do Lord, oh, do Lord,

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Do Lord, oh, do Lord, oh, do remember me, Do Lord, oh, do Lord, oh, do remember me, I'm praying Do Lord, oh, do Lord, oh, do remember me, Way beyond the blue.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Now I've got a home in glory land, that outshines the sun I've got a home in glory land, that outshines the sun I've got a home in glory land, that outshines the sun Way beyond the blue, beyond the blue, I'm singing

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Well I took Jesus as my Savior, you take Him too, I took Jesus as my Savior, you take Him too, I took Jesus as my Savior, you take Him too, While He's calling you, He's calling you, I'm singing
